title: Pituitary result review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.
investigations.rationale: The exact hormone-evaluation section supports recording result source and date, associated endocrine symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-reviewed laboratory results without inferring hormone excess or deficiency.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement

investigations.text: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.
investigations.rationale: The exact imaging and visual section supports focused assessment and existing specialist correspondence when relevant; it does not recommend imaging or interpret a lesion.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement

treatment_and_management.text: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact consultation section supports clinician concern, patient questions, an entered plan, safety net and arranged follow-up only when documented.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.

source.title: Pituitary incidentaloma: a Pituitary Society international consensus guideline statement

source_limitations: Result type, value, imaging finding, lesion size, symptoms, visual findings, pregnancy, diagnosis, treatment, surveillance and referral remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
